Forged in Fire - Wettkampf der Waffenschmiede(德)
introduction: Forged in Fire is a competition show pitting master weapon makers against each other. Each week, four of the best blade smiths in the country will come together to put both their skills and reputations on the line.S9 E1 - Crushed Car ChallengeS9 E2 - BlackoutS9 E3 - The Ninja's SwordS9 E4 - Sheet Metal ChallengeS9 E5 - Blades Gone WildS9 E6 - Double Trouble BladesS9 E7 - The Knife FightS9 E8 - The Gaucho's RevengeS9 E9 - Sergeant Hayden's SwordS9 E10 - Revolutionary War ForgeS9 E11 - Flip the ForgeS9 E12 - Out to SeaS9 E13 - Gladiators of the Forge: Let the Battles BeginS9 E14 - Gladiators of the Forge: The Battles ContinueS9 E15 - Gladiators of the Forge: Viking vs GladiatorS9 E16 - Gladiators of the Forge: A Champion's QuestS9 E17 - Gladiators of the Forge: The Final BattlesS9 E18 - The Notorious NagaS9 E19 - Fastest Blade in the WestS9 E20 - Best in DamascusS9 E21 - Friend or FoeS9 E22 - Supersized SwordS9 E23 - Supersized Elephant SwordsS9 E24 - Supersized: 5 Ton ChallengeS9 E25 - Forged in Fire: Marvel's Midnight SunsS9 E26 - Supersized: Hog Wild
